entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used for hybrid seed production

entities.name: ICPA 2043
entities.description: A cytoplasmic-nuclear-male-sterile line of hybrid pigeonpea

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The amount of seed produced per unit area, measured in kg/ha

entities.name: PLANT SPACING
entities.description: The distance between plants and rows, such as 75 cm x 30 cm

entities.name: IRRIGATION FREQUENCY
entities.description: The interval of days between irrigation events, such as 14 or 18 days

entities.name: PLANTING RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of male-sterile to male-fertile lines used in planting

entities.name: PLANT POPULATION DENSITY
entities.description: The number of plants per unit of land area

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of living biological organisms in a plant

entities.name: NUMBER OF PRIMARY BRANCHES
entities.description: The count of main branches emerging from the plant stem

entities.name: PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: The number of seed pods produced by an individual plant

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant from the ground to the tip

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC-NUCLEAR-MALE-STERILITY
entities.description: A genetic condition where pollen is non-functional due to cytoplasmic and nuclear interactions

relationships.description: ICPA 2043 is a specific line of PIGEONPEA
The study evaluates the SEED YIELD of the ICPA 2043 line
PLANT SPACING significantly influences the SEED YIELD per hectare
IRRIGATION FREQUENCY affects the SEED YIELD of the crop
PLANTING RATIO influences the total SEED YIELD
PLANT POPULATION DENSITY determines the SEED YIELD per hectare
PLANT POPULATION DENSITY affects the PLANT HEIGHT
PLANT POPULATION DENSITY influences the BIOMASS of individual plants
PLANT POPULATION DENSITY affects the NUMBER OF PRIMARY BRANCHES
PLANT POPULATION DENSITY influences the PODS PER PLANT
